channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Season 3 Is Doing What You Hoped
item.description: Spoilers abound, but Marvel's giving fans yet another reason to watch 'Daredevil: Born Again.'

item.title: La Nasa confie la survie d’Artemis II à l’Europe : une première pour un module clé dont personne ne parle
item.description: Quatre astronautes volent en direction de la Lune qu’ils survoleront dans la nuit de samedi à dimanche. À bord du véhicule Orion, ils s’apprêtent à signer un nouveau record. Au cœur de cette ambitieuse mission, se trouve le module de service d'Orion, un élément clé fourni par l'Agence spatiale...

item.title: My dream pair of AR gaming glasses needs to have these nine features
item.description: I’ve spent months in the lab testing the latest AR glasses from Xreal and Viture. By “lab,” I mean cozied up on my couch each night, playing my Steam Deck or Nintendo Switch 2 on a huge, virtual screen that only I can see through these glasses. Using AR glasses as a portable display for […]

item.title: How to watch Lauren Price v Stephanie Pineiro: live stream boxing for free, preview, ringwalks, fight card
item.description: See how to watch Lauren Price vs Stephanie Pineiro live streams online, as the Welsh world champion looks to defend her titles in front of her home fans.

item.title: I spent months with Honor Magic 8 Pro, and it's one of the best all-round flagships on the market
item.description: The Honor Magic 8 Pro is another compelling, high-spec flagship from the Chinese phone giant.

item.title: J’ai testé la DJI Osmo Action 6 et la concurrence doit absolument se réveiller pour rattraper son retard
item.description: DJI veut frapper fort avec sa sixième génération de caméra d'action en intégrant une caractéristique inédite sur ce marché. Alors que GoPro a fait l'impasse sur une éventuelle Hero 14 en 2025, cette Osmo Action 6 a-t-elle un boulevard devant elle ?

item.title: Score up to 50% off in the Argos Big Red sale — I've found the 14 best deals on tech, appliances, homewares, and more
item.description: Big savings on fitness tech, vacuums, and outdoor goods

item.title: I finally sold my CD collection — and it reminded me why iTunes was better than any streaming service in 2026
item.description: Here's how burning discs onto an old iPod helped me appreciate physical media.

item.title: Galaxy A57 vs Redmi Note 15 Pro+ : quel nouveau champion du milieu de gamme en promo choisir ?
item.description: Nouvelles stars du milieu de gamme en 2026, le Samsung Galaxy A57 et le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro+ sont déjà en promo à moins de 500 euros. Mais lequel choisir entre la polyvalence de Samsung et l'excellent rapport qualité-prix du Redmi ? On vous aide à y voir clair dans ce comparatif complet !

item.title: 'The navigation systems on board aircraft and drones will be off significantly': Why aging magnetic data poses a growing risk and how quantum sensors could help fix it
item.description: Quantum diamond magnetometers could enable resilient navigation without GPS, while supporting defense, security, and future magnetic mapping systems.

item.title: Sonos Play Review: Performance Meets Convenience
item.description: With great sound and versatility, this new speaker may be Sonos’ best.

item.title: Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
item.description: "This looks like AI." It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms refuse to label even obvious AI content. This leads me to one […]

item.title: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
item.description: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

item.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill — release date, confirmed cast, and more about the Marvel TV Special on Disney+
item.description: The Punisher: One Last Kill will be the next Marvel Special Presentation to debut on Disney+ — here's what we know about it so far.

item.title: Chelsea vs Port Vale Free Streams: How to Watch FA Cup Quarter-Final 2025/26 Online From Anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Chelsea vs Port Vale in the FA Cup quarter-finals, with the home side looking to avoid a cup upset against the League One strugglers.
